name: Jason Hum
bio: Leading the STEAM & Computer Science Department with a focus on AI in education and innovative teaching practices. Jason brings a passion for educational technology and curriculum development, with research interests in how artificial intelligence can enhance learning outcomes.
education: MSc Information Technology in Education, University of Hong Kong | PGCEi, University of Nottingham | B.A. Information Technology, York University (Canada)

name: Hiren Bhavsar
bio: Specializing in computer science education with a strong foundation in computer applications and technology. Hiren brings expertise in programming, educational technology, and assessment practices to the classroom, with a commitment to student-centered learning.
education: International PGCE, University of East London | MCA Computer Technology, Gujarat Technological University
